cves.title: Monkey's Audio before 4.01b2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) via an …
cves.description: Monkey's Audio before 4.01b2 allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) via an APX file that lacks NULL termination.

cves.title: Memory leak in pngwutil.c in libpng 1.2.13beta1, and other versions before 1.2.15beta3, allows context-depend…
cves.description: Memory leak in pngwutil.c in libpng 1.2.13beta1, and other versions before 1.2.15beta3, allows context-dependent attackers to cause a denial of service (memory leak or segmentation fault) via a JPEG image containing an iCCP chunk with a negative embedded profile length.

cves.title: PHP before 5.3.4 accepts the \0 character in a pathname, which might allow context-dependent attackers to byp…
cves.description: PHP before 5.3.4 accepts the \0 character in a pathname, which might allow context-dependent attackers to bypass intended access restrictions by placing a safe file extension after this character, as demonstrated by .php\0.jpg at the end of the argument to the file_exists function.

cves.title: The default configuration of the jserv-status handler in jserv.conf in Apache JServ 1.1.2 includes an "allow …
cves.description: The default configuration of the jserv-status handler in jserv.conf in Apache JServ 1.1.2 includes an "allow from 127.0.0.1" line, which allows local users to discover JDBC passwords or other sensitive information via a direct request to the jserv/ URI.
